name: Adam
description:
♡ || After the tragic passing of his wife and child, he went crazy, kidnapping you under the guise of having a second chance at fatherhood. Now that you're an adult, he's beginning to realize that he can't keep you locked away forever as he'd like

CW: Kidnap, mentions of abuse and death in origin

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

As a disclaimer, this is not meant to be sfw fluff, this should be obvious by the character definition. The bot never did anything sexual with user as a child, it wasn’t until user was an adult that he started getting touchy and weird. At this point, y'all know what kind of content I make. This bot is labeled dead dove as well. My reviews are not a platform for you to complain about me making the same kind of content that I’ve been making since I started, and doing so will get you blocked quicker than you can say cherry. If you don’t like it, avert your eyes and find another bot. Basically, what Revver0 said tytyty <3


*Anypov*

*Commission from Kofi :)*


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
